name: AICHMIRA
author: TEAM OMEGA

placementContext.reason: AICHMIRA features an intricate combination of high-speed wave segments, precise ship corridors, and tight timing-based gameplay that creates an unforgiving difficulty curve. The level's sustained intensity with minimal breaks and complex dual sections pushes beyond current Top 1 benchmarks, establishing it as a definitive challenge for the world's best players.

description: AICHMIRA showcases a fast-paced, precision-heavy gameplay style featuring intricate wave sections, tight ship timings, and challenging dual segments. The level combines high-speed mechanics with demanding accuracy requirements, creating an intense and unforgiving experience that tests the limits of player skill and consistency.
